summary: Iteration 324: Observatory COMPLETE REWRITE - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested: (1) Toggle-based sonification - click 'Activate Earth's Frequency (194.2Hz)' toggles ON to 'Earth's Frequency Active — 194.2Hz', click again toggles OFF. (2) Immersive backgrounds - Earth shows teal glow (rgb 79,195,247), Betelgeuse shows red glow (rgb 239,68,68). (3) AtmosphericParticles component renders 20-50 floating particles. (4) Star cards expand with distance/temperature/magnitude stats. (5) Star sonify toggle buttons work. (6) Live Events expand on click with time badges. (7) Moon phase card visible. Regression: Herbology, Breathing, Light Therapy, Sovereign Circle all working.

issues: Minor HTML validation warning: nested <button> inside StarCard (button inside motion.button). Does not affect functionality but shows console warning.

critical_code_review_comments: StarCard component has nested button elements (line 210 motion.button wraps line 229 button for sonify toggle). Consider using div with onClick for outer container to avoid HTML validation warning.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Observatory complete rewrite tested and working. Key features: (1) usePersistentTone hook for toggle-based audio (not hold-to-play). (2) Immersive backgrounds with radial gradients that shift per planet/star selection. (3) AtmosphericParticles component. (4) StarCard components with individual sonify toggle buttons. All 3 tabs (Orrery, Deep Sky, Live Events) functional. Minor nested button warning in console but no functional impact.
